pairs.subject: Annual Compliance Training Reminder
pairs.desc:
Dear Team,

This is a reminder that the annual compliance training is approaching. Please ensure that you complete the training by the end of the month. The training materials are attached for your convenience.

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out.

Best regards,

HR Department
pairs.explain: The email is from HR, contains a legitimate attachment, and has a clear purpose.

pairs.subject: Urgent: Compliance Training Required
pairs.desc:
Dear Employee,

You are required to complete the compliance training immediately. Attached is the training file you must download and run. Failure to comply will result in disciplinary action.

Regards,

HR Team
pairs.explain: The email demands urgent action and contains an executable attachment, which is suspicious.

pairs.subject: Quarterly Financial Report
pairs.desc:
Hello Team,

Attached is the quarterly financial report for your review. Please take a moment to go through the document and prepare any questions you may have for our upcoming meeting.

Thank you,

Finance Department
pairs.explain: The email is from the finance department, contains a safe PDF attachment, and has a clear context.

pairs.subject: Important: Financial Report Attached
pairs.desc:
Dear Employee,

Please find the attached financial report that requires your immediate attention. It is critical that you open the file and follow the instructions inside.

Best,

Finance Team

pairs.subject: New IT Security Policies
pairs.desc:
Dear All,

We have updated our IT security policies to enhance data protection. Please review the attached document carefully and ensure compliance.

If you have any questions, do not hesitate to reach out.

Best,

IT Department
pairs.explain: The email is from IT, contains a legitimate PDF attachment, and provides clear instructions.

pairs.subject: Action Required: Update Your Security Settings
pairs.desc:
Attention Employee,

You must update your security settings immediately. Download the attached file and follow the instructions provided. Failure to do so may compromise your account.

Regards,

IT Security Team
pairs.explain: The email pressures the recipient to act quickly and contains an executable attachment, which is a red flag.

pairs.subject: Travel Expense Reimbursement
pairs.desc:
Hi Team,

Please find the attached reimbursement form for your travel expenses. Fill it out and submit it by the end of the week to ensure timely processing.

Thank you,

pairs.desc:

pairs.subject: Legal Document Review
pairs.desc:
Hello,

Attached is the document for your review regarding the recent contract negotiations. Please provide your feedback by the end of the week.

Best regards,
